task.title: View schema generator for status queue drift and briefs
task.summary: Define and generate the small, revisioned read models agents and UI consume for status, roadmap queue, task context, drift, product brief, system architecture, and recent evidence.

goal.outcome: CodeWiki exposes compact generated views that route agents to the right next read without loading raw wiki state.
acceptance: Views include revision metadata, stale flags where applicable, size budgets, and recommended next reads.
Status, roadmap queue, task context, drift, product brief, system architecture, and recent evidence views are defined.
`codewiki_state` can expose or consume the views without increasing default token load.
Views remain rebuild-owned and read-only to agents.

delta.desired: Views become the default optimized read models for inner and outer loops.
delta.current: Generated state exists but is not organized as purpose-specific v2 views with routing contracts.
delta.closure: View schemas and generation are implemented and verified.

acceptance_matrix.criterion: Views include revision metadata, stale flags where applicable, size budgets, and recommended next reads.
Status, roadmap queue, task context, drift, product brief, system architecture, and recent evidence views are defined.
`codewiki_state` can expose or consume the views without increasing default token load.
Views remain rebuild-owned and read-only to agents.
